---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Propose a new feature, contract capability, or enhancement."
title: "Feature: [Short description of the feature]"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

### Description
Provide a clear description of the proposed feature, the problem it solves, and why it is needed.

### Proposed Implementation
Describe the technical design, contract changes, and storage updates if applicable.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the updated contract interface and helper structs
- [ ] Implement the feature logic
- [ ] Add unit and integration tests covering positive and negative paths
